latestIssue.subject: AI Newsy • Apr 21 • 15 Stories
latestIssue.intro: Today, all eyes are on AI's potential for misuse, from manipulated political imagery raising concerns about disinformation to reports of the NSA using Anthropic's restricted Mythos model. We'll also dive into how companies are grappling with AI's impact, including a nuclear power startup facing a leadership crisis and tech workers training AI to take over their jobs. Plus, hear how Intercom doubled engineering output using Claude Code!
